channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: DOT dives as support shatters: risk mounts below $1.17 toward $1.10. 😮 Is a deeper pullback coming or a whale-fueled bounce ahead? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260430-price-prediction-dot-bears-taking-control-as-support-crumbles #Polkadot #DOT #CryptoNews
